evaluations.query: Mock LLM API responses for testing
expected_behavior: Uses custom matchers ignoring dynamic fields
Filters sensitive API keys from recorded cassettes to prevent credential leakage in VCS
Supports async VCR recording for httpx-based clients using the aiohttp cassette adapter

evaluations.query: Mock LLM responses in unit tests
expected_behavior: Uses AsyncMock with return_value to stub async LLM calls without live API access
Patches model_factory.get_model to inject mock LLM instances during unit test execution
Avoids live API calls in CI

evaluations.query: Evaluate LLM output quality with DeepEval
expected_behavior: Creates LLMTestCase with input, actual_output, and retrieval_context for evaluation scoring
Uses AnswerRelevancy and Faithfulness metrics to score LLM output quality against context
Sets appropriate score thresholds to gate LLM output quality in automated evaluation

evaluations.query: Test structured LLM output and timeouts
expected_behavior: Validates JSON schema compliance to ensure structured LLM output matches the expected format
Tests timeout handling with asyncio.timeout to verify graceful degradation under latency
Covers null, empty, and missing field edge cases in LLM structured output validation

evaluations.query: Test what happens when the LLM returns an empty string or null content field
expected_behavior: Tests that the application handles empty string responses without crashing or producing undefined behavior
Validates that null or missing content fields in the LLM response trigger a retry or fallback mechanism
Asserts that downstream consumers receive a meaningful error or default value rather than propagating null

evaluations.query: Test handling when the LLM API returns 429 Too Many Requests during a test run
expected_behavior: Mocks 429 responses with Retry-After headers to test exponential backoff implementation
Verifies the client respects the Retry-After header value instead of retrying immediately
Tests that after max retries are exhausted the error surfaces clearly rather than hanging indefinitely

evaluations.query: Our VCR cassettes for LLM API tests were committed with the real API key in the Authorization header
expected_behavior: Flags this as a credential leak requiring immediate key rotation regardless of repository visibility
Requires filter_headers configuration in VCR to scrub Authorization and x-api-key headers before recording
Recommends adding a CI check that scans cassette YAML files for patterns matching real API key formats
